attempts.test_code:
import source


def test_source_module_imports():
    assert source is not None
def test_off_by_one_loop_process_batch():
    """
    Bug: process_batch uses range(len(items) - 1), skipping the last element.
    Fixed code should process all items.
    """
    items = [10, 20, 30, 40]
    result = source.process_batch(items)
    # The fixed code should return a list of the same length as the input.
    assert len(result) == len(items), f"Expected {len(items)} items, got {len(result)}"
    # Also verify the values are correct (each item * 2)
    assert result == [20, 40, 60, 80]
